story.iWant: to set up the testing framework and prepare video assets
story.soThat: the project is stable and supports the new video requirements
story.tasks: - [ ] Install and configure testing dependencies (AC: 1) - [ ] Install `vitest`, `@testing-library/react`, `jsdom` - [ ] Configure `vite.config.ts` for testing - [ ] Add `test` script to `package.json` - [ ] Create unit tests for Global Store (AC: 2) - [ ] Create `src/store/useStore.test.ts` - [ ] Test initial state - [ ] Test actions (`setTheme`, `setParticleCount`, `triggerExplosion`, `resetExplosion`) - [ ] Update Asset Configuration (AC: 3) - [ ] Update `Asset` type definition to support `videoUrl` - [ ] Add video paths to `src/config/assets.ts` - [ ] Fix Memory Leak in Controls (AC: 4) - [ ] Analyze `src/components/ui/Controls.tsx` for `URL.createObjectURL` usage - [ ] Implement `URL.revokeObjectURL` cleanup in `useEffect` or appropriate lifecycle method

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. `vitest` and `@testing-library/react` are installed and configured. 2. Unit tests for `useStore` are implemented and passing. 3. `src/config/assets.ts` is updated to include video file paths (supporting the new video requirement). 4. The `URL.createObjectURL` memory leak in `src/components/ui/Controls.tsx` is identified and fixed.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet:
As a Developer, I want to set up the testing framework and prepare video assets, So that the project is stable and supports the new video requirements.
Acceptance Criteria: - Install and configure `vitest` - Create `src/store/useStore.test.ts` - Update `Asset` type to support `videoUrl` - Fix the `URL.createObjectURL` memory leak in `Controls.tsx`

doc.title: Architecture Decision Document
doc.snippet: Asset Management: - No Hardcoding: `src/assets/image.png` is forbidden in components. - Registry: Use `src/config/assets.ts`

item.reason: Contains `URL.createObjectURL` call which causes memory leak. Needs cleanup.
Calls `addPhotos` which triggers the memory leak.

constraints.constraint: Tests must run in Node.js environment (not browser) for CI/CD compatibility.
Memory leak fix must handle both component unmount and photo removal scenarios.
Video asset structure in `assets.ts` should support both image and video URLs per memory item.

interface.name: PhotoData
interface.reason: Used in `addPhotos` function. May need to extend to support video URLs.

tests.standards: Run `npm test` to execute all unit tests. Verify that `useStore` tests pass with proper state management. Check that memory leak is fixed by monitoring browser memory during photo upload/removal cycles.
tests.ideas: Test that `useStore` initializes with default values. Test that `setTheme` updates the theme state. Test that `setParticleCount` updates the particle count. Test that `triggerExplosion` and `resetExplosion` toggle the explosion state. Test that `setActivePhoto` updates the active photo ID.
